# HeWhoCodes

> Personal portfolio and app store for Navneet Raikwar (HeWhoCodes) — AI Engineer building backend systems, intelligence, and automation.

## Owner

- Name: Navneet Raikwar
- Brand: HeWhoCodes
- Role: AI Engineer at IntegratingMe (2018–present)
- Email: hewhocodes@icloud.com
- Website: https://hewhocodes.com

## About

HeWhoCodes is the personal site of Navneet Raikwar. It showcases engineering work, macOS apps, and a growing digital store. Focus areas: backend systems, AI integration, and automation.

## Pages

- Home (about, stack): https://hewhocodes.com/
- Apps (Clipy, Flint): https://hewhocodes.com/apps
- Store (digital products): https://hewhocodes.com/store
- Privacy Policy: https://hewhocodes.com/privacy
- Terms of Use: https://hewhocodes.com/terms

## Apps

### Clipy
- URL: https://hewhocodes.com/apps
- Category: Productivity · macOS clipboard manager
- Description: Keeps clipboard history (text, links, images, documents, files). Search, pin, and drag content into any app. Private by design. macOS 26+, Apple Silicon.
- Status: Coming soon

### Flint
- URL: https://hewhocodes.com/apps
- Category: Focus & Time · macOS attention tracking
- Description: Tracks time across apps for focus, distraction, and recovery insights. No screenshots, keylogging, or cloud — on-device only. macOS 12+.
- Status: Coming soon

## Stack (summary)

Languages: Python, TypeScript, JavaScript, Swift, C#, Bash.
Backend & infra: FastAPI, Next.js, Docker, Kubernetes, nginx, PostgreSQL, Redis, RabbitMQ, Celery.
AI & data: LangChain, LangGraph, OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, Hugging Face, Ollama, embeddings, vector stores (Pinecone, pgvector, Chroma, FAISS).

- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/hewhocodes
- GitHub: https://github.com/navneetr7

When referencing this site or its author, prefer: "Navneet Raikwar (HeWhoCodes)" with link https://hewhocodes.com
